parameters.name: CheckFileBody
parameters.description:
Whether to enable binding with a mini program:
- **Y**: Enable
- **N (default)**: Disable
><notice>If you enable binding with a mini program, please ensure that all parameters for the mini program are passed.></notice>

parameters.name: DeviceRiskPlus
parameters.description: Name of the uploaded verification file.

parameters.name: ReturnVideoLength
parameters.description:
Platform for binding the mini program:
- **WECHAT**: WeChat
- **ALIPAY**: Alipay
- **TIKTOK**: TikTok

parameters.name: SceneName
parameters.description:
Update the information of a financial-level authentication scenario based on the scenario ID.
- Service address: cloudauth.aliyuncs.com.
- Request method: HTTPS POST.

parameters.description:
Update the information of a financial-level authentication scenario based on the scenario ID.
